entity.label: Secacah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Enclosure, one of the six cities in the wilderness of Judah, noted for its “great cistern” (Josh. 15:61). It has been identified with the ruin Sikkeh, east of Bethany.

nodes.label: Secacah
nodes.description: Enclosure, one of the six cities in the wilderness of Judah, noted for its “great cistern” (Josh. 15:61). It has been identified with the ruin Sikkeh, east of Bethany.

verses.text: In the wilderness, Betharabah, Middin, and Secacah,
